title: Audio Evolution & Competitive Modes
summary: Day 32 builds the evolving audio identity across chapters, adds proximity-based wire-drawing audio, introduces Challenge-a-Friend URL sharing, seasonal themed challenges, enhanced play statistics (Lab Notebook), micro-celebrations for intermediate successes, Puzzle of the Week, Challenge Ladder/Blitz Mode, Speedrun Mode, and spaced repetition review levels. Each is a P3 feature — we implement the simplest viable version that integrates cleanly with existing systems.

tasks.description: Audio Progression Across Chapters — Each chapter gets a distinct audio palette. Chapter 1 = clean sine, Chapter 2 = richer harmonics (detune), Chapter 3 = FM synthesis, Chapter 4/5/6 = progressively more complex. Adjust the music pad and ambient layer based on current chapter. Store current chapter context in AudioEngine and modulate oscillator types/detuning/filter parameters.
acceptance_criteria: AudioEngine has setChapterPalette(chapterIndex) method
Music pad chord voicing changes per chapter
Gate placement sounds shift timbre based on chapter context
Transitions are smooth (no pops or clicks)

tasks.description: Wire-Drawing Continuous Audio Feedback — While drawing a wire, play a soft proximity tone that changes pitch based on distance to nearest valid pin. Use a continuously-updating oscillator that fades out when wire drawing ends.
acceptance_criteria: AudioEngine has startWireProximity() and updateWireProximity(distance) and stopWireProximity() methods
During wire drawing, a soft tone plays and pitch changes as cursor moves near valid pins
Tone stops cleanly when wire drawing is complete or cancelled
No audio if muted

tasks.description: Challenge a Friend via URL-Encoded Puzzles — After completing a challenge/daily, show a 'Challenge Friend' button that encodes the truth table, gate count, and sender's score into a URL hash. When opened, the recipient sees 'X solved this in N gates — can you beat them?'
acceptance_criteria: A 'Challenge Friend' button appears after completing a challenge or daily
Clicking it copies a URL with encoded puzzle + score to clipboard
Opening the URL loads the puzzle with target score shown
URL format is #challenge=<base64-encoded-data>

tasks.description: Seasonal/Themed Content Rotations — Add a getSeasonalTheme() function that returns current theme based on month. Display seasonal badge on daily challenge button. Apply subtle CSS class for seasonal flair.
acceptance_criteria: getSeasonalTheme() returns theme object with name, emoji, accent color
Daily challenge button shows seasonal emoji
At least 4 seasonal themes defined (spring/summer/fall/winter or monthly)
Current theme is visually indicated on level select

tasks.description: Play Statistics Dashboard ('Lab Notebook') — Enhance the existing stats modal with detailed analytics: time per level chart (text-based bar chart), gates-per-level trend, most-retried levels, favorite gate distribution, total play time.
acceptance_criteria: Stats modal shows per-level gate count comparison (text bar chart)
Stats modal shows most-retried levels (highest attempt count)
Stats modal shows total playtime tracked across sessions
Stats modal shows gate usage distribution

tasks.description: Micro-Celebrations for Intermediate Successes — During gameplay, trigger small sparkle effects and sounds for: first wire connection in a level, all gates placed, and first correct truth table row (partial match on quick test).
acceptance_criteria: First wire in a new level triggers a small sparkle burst and soft chime
Connecting the last available input across all gates triggers 'all wired' sparkle
Audio feedback is subtle (lower volume than main events)
Celebrations don't fire more than once per trigger per level

tasks.description: Puzzle of the Week — Add a weekly curated puzzle system. Define 4-8 puzzles with story context. Use week number to rotate. Show on level select with special styling. Featured above daily challenge.
acceptance_criteria: generateWeeklyPuzzle() returns a curated puzzle based on ISO week number
Weekly puzzle button visible on level select screen
Weekly puzzles have story context descriptions
At least 8 weekly puzzles defined in rotation

tasks.description: Challenge Ladder / Blitz Mode — Escalating difficulty mode: start with 2-input/1-output, each solve advances to harder puzzle. Timer counts up. Track highest level reached. Show ladder position.
acceptance_criteria: Blitz mode button on level select launches ladder
Each completed puzzle advances to a harder one (more inputs/outputs)
Timer runs continuously across puzzles
High score (highest level reached) persisted to localStorage
UI shows current ladder position and best record

tasks.description: Speedrun Mode — All campaign levels played consecutively with total timer. Show splits per chapter. Track personal best. Restart from beginning option.
acceptance_criteria: Speedrun mode button on level select
Completing a level auto-advances to next
Total elapsed time shown prominently
Per-level split times recorded
Personal best time persisted
Can exit speedrun at any point

tasks.description: Spaced Repetition Review Levels — Track when each level was last completed. Surface a 'Review' suggestion on level select when a level hasn't been played in 3+ days. Algorithm: prioritize levels with lowest stars that are oldest.
acceptance_criteria: Progress tracks lastPlayed timestamp per level
Review suggestion section appears on level select when applicable
Levels with lowest stars and oldest completion are prioritized
Clicking review starts that level normally
Review section hidden when no levels qualify

testing_focus: Audio evolution doesn't cause pops or memory leaks across chapter transitions
Challenge Friend URLs decode correctly and load proper puzzles
Blitz mode escalation and timer work correctly
Speedrun auto-advance transitions cleanly between levels
Spaced repetition doesn't show for brand-new players with no completed levels
All new modals/overlays are dismissable and don't block underlying UI
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced that breaks core gameplay (simulation, wire drawing, level loading), revert.
